title: The Frog Dweller
description:
This is my first ever mod lol and my first try at programming so expect the mod to be a little funky.
So, in your world you can find mr frog from the hit show "Smiling Friends", he's extremely fast and one-hits you.
body:
Yea so this is my first mod ever and my first attempt at programming too. So you have this epic dude from smiling friends and he will spawn randomly in your world killing everything. If you manage to kill him he will give you some epic stuff you'll be able to use in the brewing stand.

Yummers

**GECKOLIB IS NEEDED SERIOUSLY !!!!!11!**
